notTelegram.title: Open via Telegram
notTelegram.description: This page only works inside Telegram. Open the bot and tap the menu button.

confirmLink.title: Link Telegram
confirmLink.description: Link this Telegram to the {email} account? Forwarded bank notifications will land in it.

login.title: Sign in
login.description: Sign in to link Telegram and confirm transactions here.
login.noAccount: No account? Register on the website
login.error: Could not sign in. Check your email and password.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.staleInitData: The Telegram session has expired. Close and reopen the mini app.
errors.alreadyLinkedOther: This Telegram is already linked to another account. Unlink it there first.
